---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for HiMe
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that HiMe currently does not support well?

## Proposed solution

How you think it could work. Sketches, pseudo-code, or rough UI are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you dismissed them.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend (React dashboard)
- [ ] iOS app
- [ ] watchOS app
- [ ] Agent / LLM behavior
- [ ] Messaging gateway (Telegram / Feishu)
- [ ] Skills subsystem
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Links, references, screenshots.
